_meta.title: Onboarding Checklist
_meta.description:
Onboarding Checklist
Description: A visually engaging card component that displays a checklist of required items alongside a video guide. It's designed to prepare users for an onboarding process, ensuring they have all necessary documents and information ready. The component is fully responsive, theme-adaptive, and includes subtle animations to enhance user experience.
